title: 5 basic things you can do to optimise your operation fast!
description: A punchy ~30-second hero showcase for ClinicIQ. Five foundational ways a GP clinic optimises its operation fast — Excel macros, BPMN process mapping, performance trackers, workflow automation, and care plan automation. Each point lands as a bold numbered block: headline, three sharp benefits, a 3-step action. Dark luxury aesthetic with gold + teal accents, matching the ClinicIQ hero. Silent / text-driven (plays muted as a hero loop, or fullscreen with sound).
